title: Triage a GCP permission error through inheritance and conditions
description: Use Policy Troubleshooter and the resource hierarchy to find the missing role at the right node before granting anything.
body: Use when a GCP API call returns PERMISSION_DENIED and you need the minimal grant. Do not add roles/editor to move on. Actions: identify the exact permission in the error, run Policy Troubleshooter for the principal and resource, walk the inheritance chain (org->folder->project->resource) to see where access is or isn't granted, and check whether an IAM condition or VPC-SC perimeter blocks it. Validation signals include the troubleshooter showing the principal gains access after the targeted predefined role at the intended node, with a clean retry. Risk boundary: if the fix requires a broad role or org-level binding, stop and escalate.
